honest_issues: Produced report-only findings; no fixes were made by design.
No networked CVE audit was possible; dependency review is offline quick-pass only.
No live Render/Atlas/S3/worker/browser production build was exercised, so deploy-time env/config correctness remains unproven.
Secret scanning was regex/static only; full entropy/history scanning was not run.
Final report files are under gitignored runs/ and therefore do not appear in normal git status.
next: Block pre-launch flag flips on the three HIGH findings, then run a networked dependency/secret-history scan and staging auth/delete-cascade smoke after fixes land.
